task_description: Rewrite system/mk_entry.cpp to use real module implementations instead of stubs, creating a fully working REPL binary that routes queries through the smart router to knowledge graph, search engine, real-time APIs, and deep reasoner.

verification.summary: clang++ -std=c++17 -fsyntax-only -Wall passes with zero errors (only 2 pre-existing warnings from module files). Full build with -O2 -lcurl produces working 408KB binary. Binary boots, loads 767 knowledge facts from .mk files (508 core + 110 personal + 103 learned + 48 rules = 769 total, 1074 nodes, 274 relations), handles all commands (/help, /ask, /search, /status, /learn, /weather, /time, /news, /think, /quit), and shuts down cleanly saving memory state. Review feedback addressed: bare command handling, timezone extraction, noise word stripping, reasoning chains integration, periodic auto-save.
